base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of commercial_zones — a tile from 1989 simcity. Commercial zones — shops/offices at 3 density tiers. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Commercial zones — shops/offices at 3 density tiers
